languages.text: "Как можно! Дети Искупления никогда не отвернутся от Бога-Императора, даже если он проклял нас и обрек на вечные страдания!"

traits.locale_text: "Как можно! Дети Искупления никогда не отвернутся от Бога-Императора, даже если он проклял нас и обрек на вечные страдания!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Unthinkable! Children of Redemption will never turn away from the God-Emperor, even though he doomed us to eternal suffering!"
languages.original_text: "Как можно! Дети Искупления никогда не отвернутся от Бога-Императора, даже если он проклял нас и обрек на вечные страдания!"

traits.locale_text: "Unthinkable! Children of Redemption will never turn away from the God-Emperor, even though he doomed us to eternal suffering!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Unthinkable! Children of Redemption will never turn away from the God-Emperor, even though he doomed us to eternal suffering!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Unthinkable! Children of Redemption will never turn away from the God-Emperor, even though he doomed us to eternal suffering!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Undenkbar! Kinder der Erlösung werden sich niemals vom Gottkaiser abwenden, auch wenn er uns zu ewigem Leid verdammt hat!"
languages.original_text: "Unthinkable! Children of Redemption will never turn away from the God-Emperor, even though he doomed us to eternal suffering!"

languages.text: "C'est impensable ! Les enfants de la Rédemption ne se détourneront jamais de l'Empereur-Dieu, même s'il nous condamne à la souffrance éternelle !"
languages.original_text: "Unthinkable! Children of Redemption will never turn away from the God-Emperor, even though he doomed us to eternal suffering!"

languages.text: "不可思议！救赎之子永远不会背弃神帝 即使他注定让我们永世受苦！"
languages.original_text: "Unthinkable! Children of Redemption will never turn away from the God-Emperor, even though he doomed us to eternal suffering!"

languages.text: "¡Imposible! Los Hijos de la Redención nunca se apartarán del Dios-Emperador, ¡aunque nos condene al sufrimiento eterno!".
languages.original_text: "Unthinkable! Children of Redemption will never turn away from the God-Emperor, even though he doomed us to eternal suffering!"

languages.text: 「考えられない！贖罪の子らは決して神帝から背を向けない！たとえ彼が永遠の苦しみを私たちに与えたとしても！"
languages.original_text: "Unthinkable! Children of Redemption will never turn away from the God-Emperor, even though he doomed us to eternal suffering!"

languages.text: "Akıl almaz! Kefaretin Çocukları, bizi sonsuz acılara mahkum etse bile Tanrı-İmparator'dan asla yüz çevirmeyecektir!"
languages.original_text: "Unthinkable! Children of Redemption will never turn away from the God-Emperor, even though he doomed us to eternal suffering!"
